_readme: The single source of truth for the programme. Every entry becomes: a row in the home-page schedule, its own page at /events/<slug>/, and a .ics calendar file. To add an event, copy an object and fill it in — nothing else to touch. Times are 24h local (Canberra). Set links.humanitix / links.rubric when listings go live and buttons appear automatically.

events.title: Tech Talks Conference
events.blurb: A day of computing and cybersecurity talks from industry and academic speakers — ideas talks, deep technical sessions, and true-crime incident stories, in 25 and 50 minute slots.

events.title: BushBash CTF Launch
events.blurb: The 48-hour BushBash CTF goes live at 5pm. Form a team, meet other players, and start capturing flags across OSINT, Rev, Pwn, Web, Crypto and Misc.

events.title: BushBash CTF — Day Two
events.blurb: The competition continues all day in Melville Hall, with non-technical brain-break activities like GeoGuessr and Wikipedia racing alongside the main board.

events.title: Free BBQ Lunch
events.blurb: Free BBQ lunch on Fellows Oval for everyone at the festival.

events.title: Movie Night
events.blurb: Wind down day two with a movie night in the city. Venue details announced here closer to the date.

events.title: BushBash CTF Finale & Prizes
events.blurb: The final hours of the CTF, the closing ceremony, winner announcements and prizes — followed by pizza.

events.title: Free BBQ Lunch
events.blurb: Free BBQ lunch on Fellows Oval — day two.

events.title: Networking & Drinks Night
events.blurb: Cap off the festival with an evening of networking and drinks in the city with speakers, sponsors and fellow students.
